    1. SPRING_CLOUD_BUS_ENABLED

Annotation Interface ConditionalOnBusEnabled

@ConditionalOnProperty(value="spring.cloud.bus.enabled", matchIfMissing=true) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Target({TYPE,METHOD}) public @interface ConditionalOnBusEnabled
Author:
Spencer Gibb

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    SPRING_CLOUD_BUS_ENABLED
    Property name to enable / disable Spring Cloud Bus.
